items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Ugh, muggy day... Sky's gloomy, air's all wet...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Oh, man! At least let me finish my sentence!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Brrr... cold, cold, cold...

options.text: A hot meal should warm you right up.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Oh right, I'm famished! We barely had a bite sprinting all the way here from Ragunna...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Whoa, pinch me! This is a feast and a half!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hey, {PlayerName}... so, uh... we did bring enough money, right? I mean, we kinda rushed out without grabbing anything...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Oh, that... don't worry, money's not an issue.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Augusta made sure we're covered. All our food and lodging here in Septimont is billed straight to the Ephor's Palace.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: But...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I think the owner might've overdone it a little...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hah, better get used to it. You're the champ of the Great Agon!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: And you know me. If food's on offer, I'll be a scoffer. No leftovers, guaranteed!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Mmmf, yum yum...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Free stay, free meal... This Ephor really knows how to treat guests. Maybe we should, you know, hang around a bit longer.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: (Sniffs) This smells amazing!

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Abby, what do you think Imperator wants me to find? If Cartethyia's right, the last clues should be somewhere on the <te href=851028>Sanguis Plateaus</te>.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: We're so close to the finish line, just one step away. But our pace has slowed...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: (Hiccups) Relax! We're already back in Septimont, what's the rush?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: I remember Lupa said there's this weird Blightcloud hanging over the Sanguis Plateaus.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: And when the "High Tide" or whatever rolls around, all the Gladiators go there to hunt Tacet Discords.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Wait, is the High Tide coming up soon? The Ephor's invite did say something about a big hunt.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Huh... that reminds me, aren't we supposed to meet her today?!

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: A messenger came this morning. Augusta is dealing with an emergency, so our meeting's postponed... looks like it'll be a while.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: An unexpected change. It's throwing everything off course... I don't like the feel of it.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: And why me for this hunt? If it's about the Great Agon... the messenger said none of the other Gladiators were invited.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Who knows? Maybe she just wants to test her strength against you. Typical Septimontian, right?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: You think so?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I've only met her a few times, but I doubt she acts on such simple impulses.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: And as the Ephor, is she really in a position to do whatever she wants?
Guest from afar, you possess eyes as clear as crystal.
But... what troubles you so, that eyes once bright as the highland sky now darken with rolling clouds.
...A warrior who walks the blade's edge does not falter over trifles.
The clouds, if I may guess, are cast from the throne...
At the peak of Capitoline Hill, beneath the pale walls of the Ephor's Palace... secrets lie buried. And the most intricate among them are those born from the pursuit of power.
Even one as honorable as the Ephor must learn when to be ruthless.
In Septimont, a city forged in iron and blood, anyone who seeks the throne without knowing the cost is no better than a lamb marching to the butcher's knife.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: I am Nestor, a traveling poet.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: The rains in Septimont never seem eager to leave this season. So then...

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: If you are curious about the Ephor... then allow me to say that nothing would honor me more than to offer even a modest service to the Champion of the Great Agon.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Wait, how do you know {PlayerName} is the Champion? And all that stuff about the Ephor, too...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: ...Your eyes... hmm... Were we talking too loud?

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: To see and to hear are but two of the many ways to perceive. Trusting the senses is a habit, a natural expedience, but not the only option.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: Truth be told, I've been gathering inspiration for my next epic, and its protagonist is none other than Augusta, the Ephor of Septimont.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: That's why I speak of her with some familiarity.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: I have a feeling your tale with her will soon be written. And knowing more about those who walk alongside you is rarely without its benefits.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: Augusta—

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: A girl of humble birth, a Resonator of modest talent, a commoner without noble patronage. And yet from the den of wolves that is Septimont City, she rose, and eventually claimed her place.

items.speaker: Nestor
items.text: Just like the burning sun was once a cloud of dust.
